description_long: This is a rectangular hardcover book with a predominantly yellow and black cover, featuring a playful cartoon illustration of a character with glasses and spiky hair pointing upward. The cover design is bold and eye-catching, with large, contrasting text and a blue speech bubble element. The book appears to be relatively thin, with a visible white page block and a slightly rounded spine. The edges of the cover are neatly wrapped, and the corners are slightly rounded, suggesting a durable construction. The spine and front cover both display the same color scheme and visual motifs, making the book easily recognizable from multiple angles. The overall appearance is modern and designed to appeal to a broad audience, likely targeting students or casual readers.
description: A thin, rectangular hardcover book with a yellow and black cover, featuring a cartoon character illustration and bold, contrasting text. The design is modern and visually striking.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a low angle, highlighting the yellow spine with bold text and the cartoon character's head peeking from the front cover.
description_view_1: This view shows the front cover directly, emphasizing the cartoon character pointing upward and the large, bold title text.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, showing the white page block and the clean, flat surface of the cover.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the top edge, displaying the full title and the cartoon character's head, with the spine text partially visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a cartoon-style illustration of a character with spiky hair and large round glasses, pointing upward with an expressive gesture. The illustration is outlined in black and set against a yellow background, giving it a playful and approachable appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is yellow with bold black and white text running horizontally, matching the front cover's color scheme. A small cartoon character's head is also visible on the spine, adding a playful touch.
